facts.statement: Session has not yet begun substantive work — issue domain is completely undefined
No party has articulated what they need to resolve or what outcomes they seek
One parent describes the session as repeatedly slipping back into emotionally loaded history rather than staying with the immediate parenting problem.
Only one party has spoken — foundational constraint for any mediation process
Party A has described a meta-problem (process derailment) but not the substantive parenting issue underneath
One parent reports emotional flooding severe enough that continued participation feels unstable without human support.
Party B has explicitly conditioned continued participation on human mediator presence — this is a structural constraint, not a safety veto
Zero substantive information from Party B after four turns — we do not know their perspective on the parenting issue, the communication pattern, or their interests

facts_notes: Facts remain separated from unresolved feasibility questions.
